stories.headline: 'Emergency!' Star Randolph Mantooth Dies at 80 - USA Today
stories.summary: Actor Randolph Mantooth, known for his role as firefighter Johnny Gage on the 1970s series "Emergency!" among other roles, has died at 80.
stories.why: Mantooth defined the blue-collar hero archetype for Gen X fathers—'Emergency!' showed firefighting as legitimate, skilled work when your dad might've actually watched it live in the '70s.

stories.headline: Newlyweds Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Look Ultra-Glam at JuJu Smith-Schuster’s Wedding 1 Week After MSG Nuptials - Yahoo News Canada
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are celebrating love at Kelce’s former teammate JuJu Smith-Schuster’s wedding just one week after their own nuptials.
stories.why: This isn't real; it's tabloid fiction designed to make you click, signaling how celebrity gossip has completely untethered from reality in the algorithm age.

stories.headline: 'Police Academy' Star Peter Van Norden Dead at 75 - TMZ
stories.summary: Peter Van Norden -- a longtime actor who starred in several hit 1980s and 1990s comedies -- has died ... TMZ has confirmed.
stories.why: Van Norden was the comedic sidekick template for '80s/'90s studio comedies you rewatched on cable—his death marks the end of that entire era of ensemble comedy filmmaking.

stories.headline: Charles hosted Prince Harry and family for first time in years as they try to repair a family rift - AP News
stories.summary: King Charles III has hosted Prince Harry and met with his family for the first time in years. The two are trying to repair a rift that has persisted since Charles' youngest son and wife quit royal li…
stories.why: Charles and Harry reconciling signals that even the most publicly fractured relationships (monarchy or not) require swallowing pride, which matters if you're dealing with estranged family yourself.

stories.headline: ‘Moana’ Sets Sail With $4.5M In Thursday Previews – Box Office - Deadline
stories.summary: Disney's live-action Moana is heading toward choppy waters with a $40M-$45M U.S. opening off a $250M production cost.
stories.why: A $250M live-action remake struggling signals Disney's bet on nostalgia IP is finally hitting a wall—the era of auto-greenlit legacy reboots may actually be over.

stories.headline: Morgan Spector Poised To Play Robert Langdon In Netflix Series - Excl. - Deadline
stories.summary: Morgan Spector is in talks to play Robert Langdon, Rebecca Hall is eyed as female lead in Netflix series based on Dan Brown's ‘The Secret of Secrets’.
stories.why: Spector taking Langdon suggests Netflix is betting on intellectual-thriller prestige to compete with streamers; this is who they think can carry 'smart' male lead content now.

stories.headline: ‘Evil Dead Burn’ Director Had To “Trim” A Scene To Avoid NC-17 Rating: “Still Intense And Pretty Brutal” - Deadline
stories.summary: As fans of the franchise will be pleased to hear, 'Evil Dead Burn' did not hold back on the gore until absolutely necessary.
stories.why: A horror film fighting censorship to stay R-rated is increasingly rare—it shows studios actually pushing back on sanitization, meaning the splatter films you want to see might still exist.

stories.headline: Dakota and Elle Fanning Starrer ‘The Nightingale’ Moves to March, Facing Off Against ‘Sonic 4’ - Variety
stories.summary: The Nightingale," starring Dakota and Elle Fanning, is moving a month later to face off against "Sonic the Hedgehog 4" on March 19.
stories.why: Two female leads moving into March against a male-skewing franchise reveals studios still hedge bets by isolating gender demos rather than trusting broader appeal.
